steps.title: Identify the probability formula and outcomes
steps.content:
We use the probability formula, where:
  • Favorable outcomes (blank tiles) = 5
  • Total outcomes (all tiles) = 50

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content:
Apply the formula with our values:
$$P(\text{blank tile}) = \frac{5}{50}$$
Simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by 5:
$$\frac{5}{50} = \frac{1}{10}$$
Converting to decimal form: $0.1$

The answer is $\frac{1}{10}$ or $0.1$
The answer is 0.1,1/10.
